positive: A minimalist, whimsical portrait of a stylized constellation fox among geometric forest flora. The fox should have a sleek, elegant silhouette, glowing with soft cyan and magenta bioluminescence. The background features abstract, interconnected geometric lines representing the night sky and stylized foliage, using deep indigo and midnight blue tones. The composition should be centrally focused and high contrast, suitable for an apparel graphic print. Art Deco influence blended with contemporary minimalist line work, UHD, vector style, crisp edges, volumetric lighting, flat graphic design.
